evidence.snippet: Custom Lithium Battery Manufacturer & High-Rate UAV Cells | LiTrue

High-Rate Drone Battery
-----------------------
Maximize flight time and payload capacity. Tailored lightweight lithium pouch cells and battery packs for industrial and agricultural drone platforms.
Defining the industry standard for safety, longevity, and custom power performance in UAV, E-Motorcycle, and e-VTOL applications.

items.notes: Core products are LFP and NMC lithium battery cells and integrated battery packs for UAV/drone platforms.

LiTrue specializes in the R&D and manufacturing of high-performance lithium-ion cells and custom battery packs. Backed by 15+ years of engineering expertise and automated production lines, we deliver industry-leading safety and consistency.
Source premium lithium pouch cells and integrated battery systems directly from LiTrue. We provide reliable hardware with flexible OEM/ODM capabilities.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Manufactures and sells lithium battery cells and integrated battery packs (components) for drone/UAV OEMs and operators. Also serves e-motorcycle and industrial markets.

products.notes: Eight named product SKUs/families confirmed across homepage and products listing. Additional product pages were skipped by crawler.

ndaa.notes: No NDAA Section 848/889 mention anywhere in the corpus. Certifications cited are CE, RoHS, REACH, IEC, UN38.3, DNV, CCS — no US NDAA compliance claim.

blue_uas.notes: No Blue UAS or Blue sUAS mention anywhere in the corpus.

evidence.snippet: LiTrue specializes in the R&D and manufacturing of high-performance lithium-ion cells and custom battery packs. Backed by 15+ years of engineering expertise and automated production lines, we deliver industry-leading safety and consistency.

Standard sample orders are usually dispatched within 7-15 working days. For bulk mass production, the lead time is typically 45 days, depending on the order volume, custom requirements, and raw material availability.

readiness.notes: Site advertises automated production lines, 15+ years experience, bulk mass production with 45-day lead times, and standard sample dispatch in 7-15 days.

unresolved_questions: About Us page (/about-us) was skipped — could confirm company founding date, ownership, and any expanded UAV-specific capability claims.

fetch_requests.reason: Could confirm company founding, ownership structure, and whether UAV is the primary market focus vs. broad industrial; would sharpen drone_supply_chain_role confidence.
HTML product page for a UAV battery pack; would provide full specs and confirm product details for the products list.

tagline: Chinese lithium-ion cell and battery-pack manufacturer producing NMC and LFP pouch cells and integrated packs for UAVs, agricultural drones, and industrial vehicles. Portfolio includes high-C-rate cells (6C/20C), wide-temperature variants (-43°C to +45°C), and completed packs up to 66.6V/30Ah. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Public evidence sparse on US supply-chain penetration; Volkswagen PowerCo R&D partnership noted.
